name: Add custom item into to_do_list
description: We check possibility add field into to do list of some special habit
descriptionHtml: We check possibility add field into to do list of some special habit

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header

testStage.description: We check possibility add field into to do list of some special habit

steps.name: Clicking the edit icon on the habit card
Enter and add item ''Eco Bag'' to the list
